title: Oil Holds Gain as Traders Weigh Hormuz Flows After Ship Attack
title_cn: 船舶袭击后交易员权衡霍尔木兹流量，油价保持上涨

title: Oil Prices Rise as Ship Struck in Hormuz
title_cn: 霍尔木兹船舶触礁，油价上涨
summary: Oil prices turned higher after a ship was hit by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, sustaining damage to the bridge. Bloomberg's Mica Soellner has the context. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: BHP’s Incoming CEO Craig Tweaks Leadership Team Before Start

title_cn: 中国硬件科技股依靠盈利来维持涨势
summary: Chinese hardware technology stocks have been on a tear. The next challenge is showing the earnings to back it up.

title: Mideast Oil Boost Gathers Pace as Qatar Sells Crude to Asia
title_cn: 卡塔尔向亚洲出售原油，中东石油提振步伐加快
summary: Qatar has joined other Persian Gulf nations in reviving crude oil sales, with regional producers cranking up activity as peace talks between the US and Iran progress.

summary: Lingyi iTech Guangdong Co. a Chinese maker of electronic devices, is set to begin trading in Hong Kong on Friday after raising HK$8.3 billion ($1.06 billion) in a share sale, part of the city’s busiest month for listings this year.

title: H.B. Fuller Agrees to Acquire UK-Listed AMS for £659 Million
title_cn: H.B.富勒同意以 6.59 亿英镑收购英国上市公司 AMS
summary: H.B. Fuller Co. agreed to acquire Advanced Medical Solutions Group Plc, a British maker of tissue-healing medical products, for £659 million ($870 million).

title: The Close 6/25/2026
title_cn: 收盘价 2026 年 6 月 25 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Citi Wealth Head of Portfolio Construction & Analytics Olaolu Aganga, Moderna CEO Stéphane Bancel, 248 Ventures Chief Investment Strategist Lindsey Bell, JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Stephanie Aliaga, Fundstrat Global Advisors Head of Technical Strategy Mark Newton, Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller, HB Fuller CEO Celeste Mastin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Wall Street Embraces the Dollar as Warsh’s Fed Activates Bulls

title: Permira-Backed Womenswear Retailer Reformation Files for US IPO
title_cn: Permira 支持的女装零售商改革申请美国 IPO
summary: Reformation Inc., a sustainable womenswear brand that’s backed by private equity firm Permira, filed for a US initial public offering, disclosing growing sales.

title: HB Fuller CEO: Moving Portfolio Toward Faster Growth
title_cn: HB Fuller 首席执行官：推动投资组合实现更快增长
summary: HB Fuller CEO Celeste Mastin discusses the business of adhesives as they agree to acquire UK-listed AMS. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: KBW’s McGratty: ‘Bench Is Very Deep’ for JPM Succession
title_cn: KBW 的麦格拉蒂：摩根大通继任者的“替补席很深”
summary: KBW US Bank Research Head Chris McGratty discusses Marianne Lake leaving JPMorgan and what to expect with succession at the company. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Rebounds Above $4,000 as Traders Mull Interest-Rate Outlook
title_cn: 交易员考虑利率前景，金价反弹至 4,000 美元上方
summary: Gold rebounded as traders tempered expectations for interest-rate hikes, following a US inflation print that rose less than forecast.

title: Fire Breaks Out at Delta Air Lines Refinery in Pennsylvania
title_cn: 宾夕法尼亚州达美航空炼油厂发生火灾
summary: A fire broke out at Delta Air Lines Inc.’s refinery in Trainer, Pennsylvania, on Thursday.

title: South Korea’s ‘Ant’ Army Is Driving an AI Market Frenzy
title_cn: 韩国“蚂蚁”大军正在掀起人工智能市场狂潮
summary: Some 14 million retail investors are piling into shares of two big tech giants, but worries are growing about what happens if chip demand dries up.

title: Apple Prices Climb and the AI Trade Roars Back | Open Interest 6/25/2026
title_cn: 苹果价格攀升，人工智能行业卷土重来未平仓合约 6/25/2026
summary:
Get a jump start on the US trading day with Matt Miller and Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest."The AI trade is roaring back after Micron’s blowout forecast. JPMorgan shakes up succession plans for Jamie Dimon. Ford CEO Jim Farley weighs in on AI versus experience, and Apple raises prices as the chip shortage hits. Plus, Bob Sloan on market positioning risks and Adam Hetts on why earnings still matter.  Correct: Ford is aiming to cut $1 billion in costs this year. 
The caption has been updated to reflect the the correct savings figure on controllable costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: 【今朝の5本】仕事を始める前に読んでおきたい厳選ニュース
title_cn: 【今早5篇】精选上班前必读新闻
summary: ホルムズ海峡で船舶に攻撃、米PCE価格と消費支出、アップル値上げ、JPモルガンCEO後任争いで新局面、自動車部品マレリの資産取得協議

title: Trump-Backed Golf Resort Advances as Vietnam Seizes Farmland
title_cn: 越南侵占农田，特朗普支持的高尔夫度假村不断发展
summary: Eviction notices have been sent to farmers in northern Vietnam to make way for a $1.5 billion Trump Organization-branded luxury golf resort project that’s already behind schedule.

title: UK’s Crown Estate Profits Fall as Offshore Wind Fees Decline
title_cn: 随着海上风电费用下降，英国皇家房地产利润下降
summary: Profits at the Crown Estate, the property company that generates income for King Charles III, fell last year as a temporary boost from the licensing of new offshore wind farms began to fade.

title: Stocks Whipsaw as Micron Surges While Apple Sinks: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 美光科技股价飙升而苹果股价下跌：市场收尾
summary: A renewed wave of tech volatility gripped Wall Street, with a selloff in megacaps tempering optimism in other corners of the stock market that were buoyed by signs the economy is in good shape.

title: Down Jones Up, S&P 500 and Nasdaq Down | Closing Bell
title_cn: 琼斯指数下跌，标准普尔 500 指数下跌，纳斯达克指数下跌结束钟声
summary: Comprehensive cross-platform coverage of the U.S. market close on Bloomberg Television, Bloomberg Radio, and YouTube with Romaine Bostick, Katie Greifeld, Carol Massar and Tim Stenovec. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Erase Gains as Apple Price Hikes Offset Chips Strength
title_cn: 苹果股价上涨抵消芯片走强，美国股市回吐涨幅
summary: US stock indexes ended Thursday nearly where they started after a choppy trading session that saw Apple Inc.’s move to raise prices on its products unwinding some of the enthusiasm over strong chipmaker forecasts.

title: Venezuela Searches for Survivors After Quakes
title_cn: 委内瑞拉在地震后搜寻幸存者
summary: Twin earthquakes struck Venezuela, causing widespread destruction in the coastal city of Catia La Mar and the coastal state of La Guaira. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hertz Eyes Record Weekly Drop on Funding Plan, Profit Guide
title_cn: 赫兹的融资计划和利润指南每周下降记录
summary: A record-setting rout in Hertz Global Holdings Inc. stock continued for a second day.

title: US Airline Stocks Erase Pandemic Losses as Oil Prices Ease
title_cn: 随着油价下跌，美国航空股消除了疫情带来的损失
summary: A popular gauge of the US airline industry has finally recovered from pandemic-era losses after six years, as progress on a peace deal between US and Iran pushed oil prices lower and eased the pressure on carriers’ profitability.

title: Apple Shares Sink After Price Hikes Hit iPads and Macs
title_cn: iPad 和 Mac 价格上涨后苹果股价下跌
summary: Apple Inc. shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday, seeking to offset cost hikes caused by an unprecedented shortage of memory chips and storage.

title: Trump Seeks $11.1 Billion in New Aid for Struggling Farmers
title_cn: 特朗普寻求为陷入困境的农民提供 111 亿美元的新援助
summary: President Donald Trump had a surprise for the farmers he invited for dinner at the White House later Thursday: a request to Congress for $11.1 billion in assistance that would amount to the second bailout of the year for the beleaguered agriculture sector.

title: Confident In Growth Next Three Years: Casey CEO
title_cn: 凯西首席执行官对未来三年的增长充满信心
summary: Casey CEO Darren Rebelez discusses company growth, business in Texas, competition, food expansion. He speaks with Romaine Bostick on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Administration Asks OpenAI to Stagger AI Model Release
title_cn: 特朗普政府要求 OpenAI 错开人工智能模型发布时间
summary: The Trump administration has asked OpenAI to stagger the release of an upcoming powerful artificial intelligence model, according to a person familiar with the matter, nearly two weeks after rival Anthropic PBC suspended its most capable offerings from the market under regulatory pressure.

title: Musk Starts Expanding X Payments to More Users After Delay
title_cn: 延迟后，马斯克开始向更多用户扩展 X 支付
summary: Elon Musk is expanding access to digital payment venture X Money to a subset of premium users on social network X, part of his bid to turn the platform into an “everything app.”

title: Pentagon Sees Bigger Role for AI in Setting Military Targets
title_cn: 五角大楼认为人工智能在设定军事目标方面发挥着更大作用
summary: The Pentagon has quietly revised its doctrine on how the US military picks its targets in battle, opening the way for artificial intelligence to make critical wartime decisions in the future.

title: Consumer Side of AI Currently Underweighted, Says Mark Pincus
title_cn: 马克·平卡斯 (Mark Pincus) 表示，人工智能的消费者方面目前权重偏低
summary: Zynga founder Mark Pincus said that the consumer side of AI is being underweighted in comparison to the engineering and coding aspects of the technology and that capping the consumer influence is not in line with the the way the internet has developed. Pincus said that while most of AI is still a 'single player experience,' it is going to massively change our labor market and economy as it further develops. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Consumer is Feeling 'A Lot of Pressure' But Bed Bath & Beyond Sees Upside
title_cn: 消费者感到“很大的压力”，但 Bed Bath & Beyond 看到了好处
summary: Amy Sullivan, CEO of Bed Bath & Beyond, said that consumers are feeling 'a lot of pressure' but that company's outlook is that if they can do business at a low point there is a high upside to come. Sullivan also talked about Bed Bath & Beyond's efforts to engage with consumers, including a new sweepstakes around the company's iconic coupons.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Chipmaker Onsemi to Buy Synaptics in $6 Billion Stock Deal
title_cn: 芯片制造商 Onsemi 将以 60 亿美元的股票交易收购 Synaptics
summary: US chipmaker Onsemi has agreed to buy Synaptics Inc., a firm that specializes in semiconductors for smart devices, in an all-stock deal that values the company at about $6.2 billion.

title: Why South Korea’s AI Stock Mania Is a Warning
title_cn: 为什么韩国的人工智能股票狂热是一个警告
summary:
South Korea’s stock market has surged about 200% year-on-year, powered by an AI-fueled chip rally. But extreme volatility and heavy reliance on two companies may mean it’s a bubble waiting to burst. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Tenstorrent CEO on Next Leg of AI Tech, Deal Interest
title_cn: Tenstorrent 首席执行官谈人工智能技术的下一步以及交易兴趣
summary: Tenstorrent CEO Jim Keller discusses AI buildout and what’s next for chips. He speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Podcasts’ Video Push Shows Early Promise
title_cn: 苹果播客的视频推送显示出早期的希望
summary: Apple charged into video podcasts earlier this year after ceding market share to YouTube. Shows that opted in early are cautiously optimistic about the results.

title: JPMorgan's Aliaga : Seeing Whipsaw In Markets Around AI
title_cn: 摩根大通的 Aliaga：看到人工智能市场的锯齿状
summary: JPMorgan Asset Management Global Market Strategist Stephanie Aliaga discusses the current whipsaw in markets surrounding AI and gives her outlook on what’s ahead. She speaks with Romaine Bostick and Katie Greifeld on “The Close.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI Cloud Provider IREN Gets Logo on Golden State Warriors Jerseys
title_cn: AI 云提供商 IREN 在金州勇士队球衣上获得徽标
summary: The latest sign of the AI data center boom going mainstream: IREN Ltd., an Australia-founded cloud computing provider, will have its logo featured on the jerseys of the Golden State Warriors starting next season.

title: Microsoft Raises Xbox Prices for Third Time in 13 Months
title_cn: 微软 13 个月内第三次提高 Xbox 价格
summary: Microsoft Corp. announced a third substantial price increase for the company’s current-generation Xbox video-game consoles in a glaring example of the component shortage crisis that has universally driven up the cost of consumer tech products.

title: Google to Lose High-Profile AI Staffers to Rival Anthropic
title_cn: 谷歌将因竞争对手 Anthropic 流失人工智能高级员工
summary: Two leading AI researchers at Google are planning to leave for rival Anthropic, according to sources, adding to a series of high-profile departures that risk undercutting the search giant’s position in AI. Bloomberg's Julia Love joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Waymo Registers German Entity for Future European Expansion
title_cn: Waymo 注册德国实体以实现未来欧洲扩张
summary: Waymo is planning to offer its driverless robotaxis in Germany, the latest move by the Alphabet Inc. unit to expand outside the US.

title: AI Sales Start to Justify Data-Center Spending Boom, Report Says
title_cn: 报告称，人工智能销售开始证明数据中心支出繁荣是合理的
summary: Revenue from AI has reached a tipping point, showing that the hundreds of billions of dollars tech companies are spending on it may be economically sustainable, according to a report from research firm Exponential View. Azeem Azhar, founder of Exponential View, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss the findings of this report. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Qualcomm CEO on Data Center Chips, Adding Meta as a Customer
title_cn: 高通首席执行官谈数据中心芯片，添加 Meta 作为客户
summary: Qualcomm says its expansion into chips for data centers will produce “billions” in revenue in the fiscal year that begins in October, suggesting the company is gaining a foothold in the booming market for AI gear. Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon joins Bloomberg's Ed Ludlow and Romaine Bostick on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Raises Prices, Micron Rallies | Bloomberg Tech 6/25/2026
title_cn: 苹果提高价格，美光股价上涨彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 25 日
summary:
Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down Micron's blowout AI-fueled forecast shattering Wall Street's projections, and Qualcomm CEO Cristiano Amon joins to weigh in on the company's own earnings and strong annual sales forecast. Plus, Apple raises prices on some hardware, an extreme measure in direct response to the memory and storage crunch.

Correction: This video has been edited with an updated graphic which reflects the new price of the iPad Pro is $1,199. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple's Sweeping Price Hikes Hit iPads and Macs
title_cn: 苹果iPad和Mac大幅涨价
summary: Apple shares fell after it raised prices of all Macs, iPads, home devices and the Vision Pro on Thursday, seeking to offset cost hikes caused by an unprecedented shortage of memory chips and storage. Ed Ludlow explains.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Hikes Prices to Counter Memory Shortages
title_cn: 苹果提高价格以应对内存短缺
summary:
Apple raised prices of Macs, iPads, home devices, and the Vision Pro to offset cost hikes caused by a shortage of memory chips and storage. Bloomberg's consumer tech lead Mark Gurman joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech."

Correction: This video has been edited with an updated graphic which reflects the new price of the iPad Pro is $1,199. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple Raises Prices on Some Products by $500
title_cn: Apple 将部分产品价格提高 500 美元
summary: Apple customers may experience sticker shock next time they look to buy one of many products. The company is raising prices of Macs, iPads, home devices, and the Vision Pro to offset cost hikes caused by a shortage of memory chips and storage. Prices for iPhone, Apple Watch and AirPods stay the same. Mark Gurman reports. (This video has been edited with an updated graphic which reflects the new price of the iPad Pro is $1,199.) (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Bob Sloan's Market Positioning Warning
title_cn: 鲍勃·斯隆的市场定位警告
summary: Markets may be near record highs, but Bob Sloan, S3 Partners Founder & Managing Partner says the real story is happening beneath the surface. He joins Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why passive investors are fueling AI stocks higher while hedge funds quietly sell into the rally and why tracking investor positioning may be just as important as earnings or valuations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sonos Cuts 3% of Staff Across User Experience, Product Teams
title_cn: Sonos 在用户体验和产品团队方面裁员 3%
summary: Sonos Inc. made cuts across its user experience, product and design teams, citing a need to streamline the organization and operate more efficiently.

title: Micron's AI Pricing Power Explained
title_cn: 美光科技的人工智能定价能力解释
summary: Micron's pricing power may have permanently changed the semiconductor industry. D.A. Davidson analyst Gil Luria joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why AI has turned memory into a strategic asset and how Apple could actually emerge stronger despite rising chip costs. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lutnick Delayed Canada Bridge Debut to Seek Bigger Cut of Toll Revenue
title_cn: 卢特尼克推迟了加拿大大桥的开通，以寻求更大的通行费收入削减
summary: Commerce Secretary Howard Lutnick intervened to delay the opening of a new bridge between the US and Canada and is pressing to renegotiate the deal for a larger share of toll revenue, people familiar with the matter said.

title: US Sanctions Rwandan Refinery in Congo Gold Smuggling Network
title_cn: 美国制裁刚果黄金走私网络中的卢旺达炼油厂
summary: The US has sanctioned Rwanda’s Gasabo Gold Refinery Ltd. for fueling conflict by processing gold stolen from eastern Democratic Republic of Congo.

title: Rep. Casten: Encouraged by Johnson Move on Housing Bill
title_cn: 众议员卡斯滕：受到约翰逊住房法案举措的鼓励
summary: Democratic Rep. Sean Casten of Illinois says he is "very encouraged" House Speaker Mike Johnson will send President Donald Trump the bipartisan housing bill, arguing the move suggests Johnson is standing up to Trump as the president's poll numbers fall. Rep. Casten also says he is not yet a "hell no" on Trump's Iran supplemental request, but says that while he has not reviewed the full bill, he is not confident it addresses "real problems." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Taps Chris Klomp as No. 2 Official at RFK Jr.’s HHS
title_cn: 特朗普任命克里斯·克洛普为小罗伯特·肯尼迪卫生与公众服务部二号官员
summary: President Donald Trump formally nominated the top aide to Health Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. as the department’s deputy secretary in a social media post on Thursday.

title: LaVorgna: Fed May Need to Raise Rates
title_cn: 拉沃尔尼亚：美联储可能需要加息
summary: Joe LaVorgna, SMBC Americas Chief Economist and former Counselor to Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent, says the Fed will not cut rates and may need to raise them as PCE inflation rises to a three-year high. LaVorgna says a resilient labor market could lead workers to press for higher wages, adding to inflation pressure, and calls Trump’s Fed chair pick Kevin Warsh “a great pick.” He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Steil: Housing Bill Will Become Law Despite Delay
title_cn: 众议员斯泰尔：尽管延迟，住房法案仍将成为法律
summary: Rep. Bryan Steil, a Wisconsin Republican, says he believes the bipartisan housing bill President Trump delayed signing will ultimately be enacted, citing overwhelming support in Congress. Steil says he supports the SAVE America Act, but notes there are other ways to pursue the President's election goals, including updating the REAL ID Act. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg’s “Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Indonesia Opens Door to Dirty Money to Fund Prabowo’s Plans
title_cn: 印度尼西亚向脏钱敞开大门，资助普拉博沃的计划
summary: Indonesia is dangling unprecedented legal protections for investors in President Prabowo Subianto’s sovereign wealth fund, a move analysts warn could attract money with questionable origins and further erode the reputation of Southeast Asia’s largest economy.

title: FDA Commissioner Shortlist Includes New York Cancer Practice CEO
title_cn: FDA 专员入围名单包括纽约癌症实践首席执行官
summary: Jeff Vacirca, a physician and leader of a prominent New York oncology group, is among the final candidates the Trump administration is considering to lead the Food and Drug Administration, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Family Feud Poses Fresh Risk to Flavio Bolsonaro’s Brazil Presidential Bid
title_cn: 家族不和给弗拉维奥·博尔索纳罗竞选巴西总统带来新风险
summary: Brazil’s most prominent conservative family is feuding again, posing fresh risks to the presidential candidacy of Flávio Bolsonaro just when it seemed he had an opening to hit leftist leader Luiz Inácio Lula da Silva.

title: US Army Bases to Host Critical Minerals Processing Plants
title_cn: 美国陆军基地将设立关键矿物加工厂
summary: The US Army struck deals with several companies to build critical minerals processing plants on military bases around the country, a first-of-its-kind initiative by the Trump administration to boost domestic production of key materials.

title: Trump Urges Republican Allies to Stop Legislative Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普敦促共和党盟友停止立法封锁
summary: President Donald Trump urged his party to unite around his agenda following a Thursday meeting with House Speaker Mike Johnson intended to defuse escalating tensions between the White House and congressional Republicans.

title: New Bill Calls for GSEs to Buy and Securitize Construction Loans
title_cn: 新法案要求政府支持企业购买建筑贷款并将其证券化
summary: New draft legislation in Congress would direct housing giants Fannie Mae and Freddie Mac to buy homebuilder construction loans and package them into bonds in the latest push to cut the cost of building homes and boost supply.

title: Israel Keeps Grip on Lebanon as Beirut Eyes Hezbollah-Free Zone
title_cn: 贝鲁特着眼于无真主党区，以色列继续控制黎巴嫩
summary: The Israeli and Lebanese governments are discussing locations for US-proposed areas in southern Lebanon where the Beirut government could prove its ability to keep out Hezbollah.

title: Micron, Qualcomm Jump on Bright AI-Fueled Forecasts | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/25/2026
title_cn: 美光科技和高通公司在人工智能推动下做出了光明的预测彭博商业周刊日报 6/25/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, former US Ambassador to NATO Kay Bailey Hutchison, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, American Principles Project Political Director Katie Frost and Taxpayers for Common Sense President Steve Ellis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Iran’s Leaders Are in No Hurry to Get a Peace Deal
title_cn: 伊朗领导人并不急于达成和平协议
summary: On today’s Big Take podcast, David Gura and Bloomberg Opinion’s Marc Champion reflect on the state of negotiations between the US and Iran, discuss why Tehran will likely emerge from the conflict in a better strategic position than before and what foreign powers – from the Gulf to China – will be watching for in a proposed settlement. Listen wherever you get your podcasts. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Hosts Evangelical Leaders, Seeks to Shore Up Key Voter Bloc
title_cn: 特朗普接待福音派领袖，寻求支持关键选民群体
summary: Polls suggest evangelical voters have doubts about Trump’s Iran war and deportation plan

title: US Regulator Moves to Ease Deposit Insurance Fund Fees for Banks
title_cn: 美国监管机构采取措施放宽银行存款保险基金费用
summary: The Federal Deposit Insurance Corp. proposed Thursday letting banks pay less to the agency’s bedrock insurance fund that protects customer accounts if a lender collapses.

title: FCC Waiting on Interagency Review of Paramount-Warner Bros. Deal
title_cn: FCC 正在等待派拉蒙与华纳兄弟交易的跨机构审查
summary: Federal Communications Commission Chairman Brendan Carr said he’s waiting for a joint federal committee called “Team Telecom” to weigh in on Paramount Skydance Corp.’s proposed acquisition of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc. before his agency makes its own decision on the deal’s financing.

title: Real Yield 6/25/2026
summary: "Bloomberg Real Yield" highlights the market-moving news you need to know. Today's guests: Citi Head of Global Rates Deirdre Dunn, T. Rowe Price Co-Portfolio Manager Dynamic Global Bond Strategy Adam Marden, JPMorgan Asset Management Fixed Income Portfolio Manager Stephanie Doyle, and BNP Paribas Global Head of Credit Strategy & Desk Analyst Viktor Hjort. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Spars With Disaffected Senate | Balance of Power 6/25/2026
title_cn: 特朗普与心怀不满的参议院发生争执权力平衡 6/25/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest news from the Trump Administration. On today's show, former US Ambassador to NATO Kay Bailey Hutchison, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino, American Principles Project Political Director Katie Frost and Taxpayers for Common Sense President Steve Ellis. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: A Heartless Supreme Court Decision
title_cn: 最高法院无情的判决
summary: The Supreme Court held that by stopping asylum seekers from crossing the border, the US can avoid ever having to determine whether their lives are in danger if they return. That is a betrayal, says Harvard Law’s Noah Feldman. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: NJ Lawmakers Agree to Advance $60.7B Budget
title_cn: 新泽西州立法者同意推进 $60.7B 预算
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence's Matthew Gastall joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." New Jersey lawmakers have agreed to advance a $60.7 billion budget plan that would more than halve the income threshold for the state’s new property tax relief program for senior citizens, reducing the number of individuals who could qualify. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: DiNapoli Wins First Primary Challenge Since 2007
title_cn: 迪纳波利 (DiNapoli) 赢得自 2007 年以来的首次初选挑战
summary: Bloomberg's Martin Braun joins Katie Greifeld on "Bloomberg Real Yield." - New York Comptroller Thomas DiNapoli secured an easy victory in his first primary challenge since 2007, according to a projection by Decision Desk HQ. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ship Struck in Hormuz as Oil Supertankers Turn Back Again
title_cn: 超级油轮再次返航，霍尔木兹发生船舶碰撞
summary: A ship was hit by an unknown projectile in the Strait of Hormuz, just hours after several freighters turned around while attempting to cross the vital waterway, developments that may undermine what had been a rapid reopening of the energy chokepoint.

title: Rubio Rejects Hormuz Tolls After Touring Wary Gulf Nations
title_cn: 卢比奥在访问警惕的海湾国家后拒绝霍尔木兹收费
summary: The US wants to reach a deal with Iran to end the war but won’t do so “at any price,” Secretary of State Marco Rubio said on Thursday, as he reiterated that tolls in the Strait of Hormuz were unacceptable.

title: Carney Defends Condo-Buying Plan Panned by Critics as Bailout
title_cn: 卡尼为被批评者批评为救助的公寓购买计划辩护
summary: Prime Minister Mark Carney sought to explain a government plan to acquire vacant condos and convert them into affordable housing, which was slammed as a bailout for real estate developers after he announced it last week.

title: EU Extends Tariff Suspension in Boeing-Airbus Trade Dispute
title_cn: 欧盟延长波音-空客贸易争端关税暂停期限
summary: European Union member states agreed to extend the suspension of tariffs set to hit $4 billion of American products related to a trade dispute between Airbus SE and Boeing Co., according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Bayer Win in Supreme Court Roundup Case Is No ‘Silver Bullet’
title_cn: 拜耳在最高法院综述案中获胜并不是“银弹”
summary: After years of legal setbacks that have cost billions of dollars over its top-selling Roundup weedkiller, Bayer AG finally got a resounding win in the biggest court of all.
